column1: === STATUS VALUES for UI_Ready / API_Ready / DB_Verified ===
Reopened = Was Done but needs rework. Coding AI: pick this up.
Discussion_Pending = Waiting on human decision before coding can proceed.
Blocked = Serious obstacle - dependency missing or external issue. Cannot proceed until resolved.
Deprecated = Archived. Intentionally dropped - do not implement.
